schema.title: Response Auth Config Api Auth Config Get

get.description: Return connection status for all OAuth integrations.
Generate an authorization URL for the given integration.

Handle OAuth provider redirect after user authorization.

The provider redirects here with an authorization code and the state
parameter we generated earlier. We exchange the code for tokens,
persist them, and redirect the user to the frontend success page.

delete.description: Disconnect an OAuth integration by removing stored tokens.

schema.title: Response Disconnect Integration Api Oauth  Integration  Delete

post.description: Accept a message, publish to bus, return request_id for SSE.

get.description: SSE endpoint: streams tool-call events then the final reply.

SSE endpoint: streams agent activity (thinking, tool use) for this user.

Delivers real-time status regardless of which channel (Telegram,
webchat, etc.) originated the message being processed. Multiple
browser tabs can subscribe concurrently.

put.description: Partial update of the current user's profile.

get.description: Return the current user's channel routes with enabled status.

patch.description:
Toggle enabled status for a channel route.

If the user has no route for this channel yet (e.g. they configured
credentials but haven't messaged through the channel), a placeholder
route is created so the enabled flag can be persisted.

get.description: Return the Telegram bot username, auto-discovered via getMe.

put.description:
Update server-level LLM model configuration.

NOTE: In single-tenant (OSS) mode, all authenticated users are
effectively admins and can modify these settings. The premium layer
adds role-based guards via AdminConfigGuardMiddleware to restrict
this to admin users only.

get.description: List available LLM providers from any-llm.

schema.title: Response List Providers Api User Providers Get

get.description: List available models for a provider.

schema.title: Response List Provider Models Api User Providers  Provider  Models Get

get.description: List heartbeat logs for the current user, most recent first.

delete.description: Delete all heartbeat logs for the current user.

get.description: Aggregate LLM usage for the current user over the last N days.
List sessions with message counts, ordered by last_message_at DESC.
Get a full conversation transcript with tool interactions.

delete.description:
Delete all messages from a session, preserving memory and the session itself.

Resets the compaction pointer and system prompt so the conversation
continues with a clean slate while retaining compacted memory.

get.description: Return the current tool configuration for the user.

put.description:
Update tool configuration for the user.

Only domain-specific tools can be toggled. Attempts to disable
core tools are silently ignored.

Each entry may include ``disabled_sub_tools`` to control individual
tools within a factory group.
